title: Robust Grassy American Chicken Hash
description: A high-protein, dense American dish featuring hummus and sous-vide chicken, perfect for meal prep. This recipe is cooked in a hot pot vessel and has a grassy flavor profile.
instructions: Preheat the sous-vide machine to 140 degrees Fahrenheit.
Season the chicken breast pieces with salt and black pepper.
Place the chicken breast pieces in a sous-vide bag and seal.
Cook the chicken in the sous-vide machine for 2 hours.
Heat the olive oil in the hot pot vessel over medium heat.
Add the diced onion and minced garlic to the hot pot vessel and cook until the onion is translucent.
Add the diced bell pepper to the hot pot vessel and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Add the frozen peas and carrots to the hot pot vessel and cook until they are thawed.
Add the cooked chicken, hummus, and chopped fresh parsley to the hot pot vessel and stir to combine.
Cook for an additional 2 minutes, stirring constantly, until the hash is heated through.
Cook poultry to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F before serving.
